docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JARCHOW, JOHN SLAWSON, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AIRPORT EXPRESS SHARBAI, ARIK DRIVER, NOREEN DOE DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-06-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-04-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES B. LEBOW, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-04-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-19-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-19-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST JAMES B. LEBOW, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-19-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-03-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAURA BALCOCCHI. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-19-2002 CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO THE COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-15-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
